record_types.name: gsl_interp2d
gsl_interp2d_type

variables.name: gsl_interp2d_bicubic
variables.code:
gsl_interp2d_bicubic : access constant gsl_interp2d_type
with
   Import        => True,
   Convention    => C,
   External_Name => "gsl_interp2d_bicubic";

variables.name: gsl_interp2d_bilinear
variables.code:
gsl_interp2d_bilinear : access constant gsl_interp2d_type
with
   Import        => True,
   Convention    => C,
   External_Name => "gsl_interp2d_bilinear";
